title: CI: e2e: remove useless test
body:
Remove "HTTP if one registry" test. It is a NOP, has been skipped
for two months, and nobody knows what its original purpose was.

Closes: #18768

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```
